entity.summary: Brazil-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange and brokerage platform operating since 2010. BitcoinToYou continues to maintain an official website, account portal, fee schedule, OTC service, and withdrawal instructions. However, reliable reporting documented a broad withdrawal freeze beginning in April 2024, and HEI has not found a comparably strong public source confirming full normalization, so the exchange is classified as limited rather than active.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at year precision because first-party materials consistently state operation since 2010 without a reliable exact public-launch day. The current site advertises automatic withdrawals and publishes withdrawal instructions, but those materials do not independently establish that the 2024 withdrawal disruption was fully resolved. HEI therefore preserves the contradiction through limited status instead of forcing active or dead.

events.title: BitcoinToYou began operating in Brazil
events.description: BitcoinToYou began providing cryptocurrency buying and selling services in Brazil in 2010.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on first-party company and support materials.

events.title: Customers reported a broad withdrawal freeze
events.description: Reliable reporting documented that BitcoinToYou customers had been unable to withdraw funds since early April 2024 and that the exchange had not publicly explained the interruption at the time of reporting.
events.notes: The exact first day is not established, so HEI stores a month-level April 2024 marker. Current official withdrawal pages are visible, but no equally strong public source confirming full restoration was recovered during this review.

evidence.title: BitcoinToYou company introduction
evidence.notes: First-party English page states that BitcoinToYou has brought financial-market innovations since 2010 and facilitates cryptocurrency buying and selling.

evidence.title: Quem somos
evidence.notes: First-party support page describes BitcoinToYou as a cryptocurrency brokerage operating since 2010 with a large user base and multiple supported assets.

evidence.title: CNPJ baixado, elo com pirâmide: por trás da corretora de cripto com saques congelados
evidence.notes: Detailed reporting states that customers had been unable to withdraw since early April 2024 and that the exchange had not explained the interruption at the time.

evidence.title: BitcoinToYou fees and deadlines
evidence.notes: Current first-party page publishes deposit, trading, fiat-withdrawal, and cryptocurrency-withdrawal fees and describes automatic processing, supporting continued public operation but not independently proving complete restoration after the 2024 disruption.

evidence.title: Transferir/Sacar Criptomoedas
evidence.notes: Current official support article provides cryptocurrency withdrawal steps and contact paths; retained as evidence of continuing service claims while HEI keeps status limited.
